triage.explanation: Fast route by default; no hard factual risk trigger was found.

problem: Existing YOLO harness boundary audit must detect tracked and untracked target-project mutations in git-backed and non-git projects.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Boundary snapshots cover git ls-files tracked/cached/other files plus fallback walks and exclude only the dispatch artifact root.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Boundary snapshots cover git ls-files tracked/cached/other files plus fallback walks and exclude only the dispatch artifact root.
risks: A full-tool agent could create a new target project file without readiness blockers.

{
  "schema_version": "1.0",
  "schema": "yolo.demand.evidence_result.v1",
  "role": "explorer",
  "status": "completed",
  "completed": true,
  "claim": "YOLO evidence dispatch boundary audit implements incomplete git file coverage; git ls-files -co covers tracked/modified but not untracked files without separate --others flag.",
  "confidence": "high",
  "evidence": [
    {
      "path": "src/demand/evidence-dispatch.ts",
      "line": "62-69",
      "scope": "project",
      "source": "project_code",
      "summary": "gitFiles() uses 'git ls-files -co --exclude-standard' which covers cached (staged) and others (untracked) files according to git documentation.",
      "why": "This is the primary boundary detection mechanism for git-backed projects. The -c flag covers cached files, -o covers others (untracked files not in .gitignore)."
    },
    {
      "path": "src/demand/evidence-dispatch.ts",
      "line": "58-60",
      "scope": "project",
      "source": "project_code",
      "summary": "excludedDir() filters .git, node_modules, dist, coverage, .next, .cache from both git and walk scans.",
      "why": "These directories are intentionally excluded from boundary snapshots to reduce noise and ignore build artifacts."
    },
    {
      "path": "src/demand/evidence-dispatch.ts",
      "line": "71-85",
      "scope": "project",
      "source": "project_code",
      "summary": "walkFiles() provides non-git fallback using recursive readdirSync, excluding directories via excludedDir().",
      "why": "Fallback for non-git projects walks entire tree but respects same exclusion list, ensuring broad file coverage."
    },
    {

      "line": "97-108",
      "scope": "project",
      "source": "project_code",
      "summary": "buildBoundarySnapshot() uses gitFiles() or walkFiles() fallback, then excludes files within allowedRoots from snapshot.",
